series_metadata.series_title: Cambridge System Development and Maintenence Documents
series_metadata.series_description: The Cambridge System Development and Maintenence Documents includes business requirements, defect and resolution documentation, testing documentation and correspondence related to system development documentation pursuant to BWC''s contract with it''s third party systems administrator, cambridge Integrated Systems Group, Inc. This packet is used to develop and maintain a system to support the Health the Health partnership program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in house for 3 years then download to CD, then transfer to offsite storage for 19 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in offsite storage for 19 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
